dialogue.line: Damn it i can't let this green haired kid with pronouns embarrass in front of all these people. I gotta think of something to beat him and fast. Well, well well would ya... look at that quite a crowd gathered to watch me slaughter you. Just like a deer caught in the headlights of an oncoming semi truck. You won't know what hit ya. Until it obliterates the shit out of you

oh what's wrong? Is the illustrious daddy dearest scared of losing a rap battle to little old me? How adorable. And here i thought you were fearless. Let me guess you bribed all your previous opponents to lose on purpose to save you the embarrassment of a humiliating defeat?
Let me guess? You're about to go super rockstar? You have some hidden ability that makes your voice bearable to listen to? I don't give a shit. Let's just get this battle over with.
Be warned boy. Nobody's and i mean not one single individual has ever beaten me when i'm at my peak.
First time for everything. Hope your wife prepared a way to recover that fragile pride of yours. Because i'm about to show you the animal i have become!
You're an animal in bed alright~
Hope you're ready for a beatdown from the one and only greatest rockstar in the world!
